name: daedalus-dashboard
description: Hermes dashboard tab for the Daedalus plugin. Source: src/App.jsx → dist/index-<hash>.js (esbuild IIFE, content-hashed for cache-busting). React is provided at runtime by the Hermes Plugin SDK and is never bundled.

scripts.test: node test-cronSchedule.js && node test-derive.js && node test-build.js
